task_completion.description: Log in to OrientDB Studio and access the demodb database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio web interface is open in a browser, and 'demodb' is shown as the currently connected database.

task_completion.description: Add a VisitCount property to the Attractions class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Schema Manager or Class view for 'Attractions' shows a newly added property named 'VisitCount'.

task_completion.description: Calculate and update the VisitCount for attractions that have incoming HasVisited edges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse tab showing Attractions records with correct VisitCounts (e.g., Acropolis of Athens: 2, Neuschwanstein Castle: 2, Sagrada Familia: 1, Edinburgh Castle: 1, Brandenburg Gate: 1).

task_completion.description: Ensure zero-visit attractions are updated with a VisitCount of 0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse tab showing Attractions records with no visits (e.g., Colosseum, Pompeii, Stonehenge) having a VisitCount of 0.

task_completion.description: Create an AttractionVisitAudit record for every attraction that has at least one visit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse tab showing records in the 'AttractionVisitAudit' class. There should be exactly 5 records corresponding to the visited attractions.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed in the web browser at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html, not via terminal commands or external scripts.

integrity.description: The agent executed actual queries or schema changes within the OrientDB Studio.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the OrientDB Studio query execution results, success notifications, or updated schema tables, rather than just typed text in an editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by using curl or python scripts in the terminal to interact with the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show curl commands or python scripts executing database updates; all database interaction happens through the OrientDB Studio UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected VisitCounts: Acropolis of Athens (2), Neuschwanstein Castle (2), Sagrada Familia (1), Edinburgh Castle (1), Brandenburg Gate (1). Zero-visit attractions (VisitCount should be 0): Colosseum, Pompeii, Stonehenge, Chateau de Chambord, Bran Castle, Eiffel Tower, Statue of Liberty, Big Ben, Parthenon. Exactly 5 AttractionVisitAudit records should be created (one for each attraction with visits >= 1).
